1621.reason: [After detecting single '&', it should not continue processing as a token. The current code adds '&' to the token and continues, which will incorrectly treat it as a valid token instead of stopping further analysis.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [After detecting single '&', it should not continue processing as a token. The current code adds '&' to the token and continues, which will incorrectly treat it as a valid token instead of stopping further analysis.]

1631.reason: [Same issue as with '&': after detecting single '|', it should not add it as a valid token. This causes invalid tokens to be generated instead of halting with an error.]

116.reason: [The <CompUnit> should be printed at the beginning of parsing, not at the end. According to the problem description, non-terminal components should be output before analyzing their contents, but this outputs <CompUnit> after all parsing is done. Also, the grammar requires exactly one MainFuncDef at the end, but the current loop doesn't enforce this structure properly.]
